content.stem: This color and position pattern has two rules working together: Red-Left, Blue-Right, Green-Left, Red-Right, Blue-Left, Green-Right, ___. What comes next?
content.explanation: Two patterns run simultaneously: colors cycle Red→Blue→Green→Red, and positions alternate Left→Right→Left. The 7th position needs Red (continuing the color cycle) and Left (continuing the position alternation).

metadata.cognitive_skill: Dual simultaneous pattern tracking with different cycle lengths

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student correctly tracks color cycle (Red is next) but assumes position continues as Right
Student correctly identifies Left position but miscounts color cycle
Student assumes pattern repeats previous Green-Left instead of tracking both rules
